nasb.text: Then I reprimanded the nobles of Judah and said to them, “What is this evil thing you are doing, by profaning the sabbath day?

esv.text: Then I confronted the nobles of Judah and said to them, “What is this evil thing that you are doing, profaning the Sabbath day?

cnv.text: 於是我責備猶大的貴族，對他們說：“你們怎麼行這惡事，褻瀆安息日呢？

ccb.text: 我斥责犹大的贵族说：“你们为何做这恶事干犯安息日？
